name: Madison Martinez
about: 2 years in department store retail at Bloomingdale's and Nordstrom. Thrives in high-volume environments during sales events. Retailers praise her speed and adaptability.
interviewTranscript: I do come from a retail background experience. I was a sales associate, so I did cashier duties, collect payments, and maintain customer interactions. I would consider myself an outgoing person. I love helping people, and I really work best in a fast-paced work environment. A time I went above and beyond for a customer was when this lady came into our store trying to find the perfect gifts for her nephew, and she wasn't really sure which was the best option, so I kind of helped her decide which one was best with all the details she gave me, so eventually we came to a decision, and she was very, very thankful because it was overwhelming for her, but she overall had a very satisfying experience. What makes me successful in a retail environment, I would say, is my positive attitude. I'm always smiling, always wanting to help people, and just make sure everyone has a good time and gets all the help they need.
